deals.reinvestment_policy: Investors may choose cash distributions OR reinvestment (DRIP). Election is made at the time of subscription and can be changed with 30-day written notice.
deals.redemption_rules: Redemptions are processed quarterly with 60-day notice. Contact Diego Traversari for all redemption requests.

general_notes: K-1 tax forms are typically available by March 15 each year via the investor portal.
Quarterly updates and distribution notices are sent via email and posted to the portal.
Investors can toggle reinvestment preference in their portal profile under 'Distribution Settings'.
For redemption requests, escalate to Diego Traversari. Minimum redemption: $25,000.
